pages.text: The $(item)Large Nether Lava Skyseed$() — a $(item)Large Aquatic Skyseed$() centred in basalt + lava buckets. A broad lagoon (and a Large lava island topside).
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

A broad $(bold)lava lagoon$() — a wide contained lake, a bigger $(item)Strider$() pack, magma shores. And like the normal Nether Lava, thrown $(bold)topside$() it grows a full-size $(bold)Large$() lava island, the overworld's only one.
$(bold)Crafted$()$(br)A $(item)Large Aquatic Skyseed$() in the centre of a 3x3 of $(item)basalt$() and buckets of $(item)lava$() (returned empty).
